edges.evidence_quote: The Rockers Motor Club , often abbreviated as the Rockers MC , was a Canadian outlaw biker gang and support club for the larger Hells Angels Motorcycle Club .
edges.context: Rockers MC was a support club for Hells Angels, carrying out their unlawful objectives.

edges.evidence_quote: Prior to the formation of the Angels-affiliated Rockers Motor Club in the early 1990s, another biker gang had coincidentally existed in the same area known as the Montreal Rockers Motorcycle Club, also nicknamed "the Rockers".
edges.context: The Montreal Rockers Motorcycle Club existed earlier and was unrelated to the Hells Angels-affiliated Rockers.

edges.evidence_quote: This particular group emerged as a supporter club for the Montreal chapter of the Outlaws MC before eventually working its way up to become their second chapter within the city in 1978.
edges.context: Montreal Rockers started as a support club for Outlaws MC and later became their chapter.

edges.evidence_quote: Territory of the Hells Angels and Rock Machine began to overlap with one another which incited much conflict between the two before a large-scale gang war broke in 1994 .
edges.context: Hells Angels and Rock Machine were rivals in a gang war over drug turf.

edges.evidence_quote: In amidst of the war with Rock Machine, Rockers MC biker Paul "Fon Fon" Fontaine, along with an accomplice, murdered provincial prison guard Pierre Rondeau ...
edges.context: Rockers MC was involved in the war against Rock Machine, carrying out attacks.

edges.evidence_quote: Walter "Nurget" Stadnick instructed the Rockers Motor Club to found an auxiliary outlaw motorcycle club of their own which would be based out of out west in Winnipeg, Manitoba . The resulting one-percenter supporter club that came about was the Redliners
edges.context: Rockers MC founded the Redliners as an auxiliary club.

edges.evidence_quote: Stadnick plan ned to oppose two of Western Canada's dominant biker gangs: the Los Brovos and the Spartans MC.
edges.context: Redliners were intended to oppose Los Brovos.

edges.evidence_quote: Stadnick plan ned to oppose two of Western Canada's dominant biker gangs: the Los Brovos and the Spartans MC.
edges.context: Redliners were intended to oppose Spartans MC.

edges.evidence_quote: a longstanding HAMC-affiliated outlaw motorcycle club based in Laval, Quebec known as the Death Riders MC assimilated into a new chapter of the Rockers Motor Club which became known as Rockers MC North.
edges.context: Death Riders MC assimilated into Rockers MC North, becoming part of Rockers.

edges.context: Hells Angels formed an alliance with the Rizzuto crime family.
